caption: A news broadcast features a man with a beard speaking into several microphones, including one labeled "ANI." He is surrounded by other people in a crowded indoor or semi-outdoor setting. In the initial scenes, the man is the central focus, wearing a dark vest over a light-colored shirt. To his left, a portrait of a man is displayed with the text "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," and on the right, small portraits of "संतोष सुमन" and "सुमित कुमार" appear under the heading "मंत्री." The red and yellow news banners at the bottom shift from "JDU कोटे से श्रवण कुमार" to "HAM के." As the scene progresses, the view widens to show a group of men in white shirts standing together, with portraits of "सबरात चौधरी," "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार," and "विजय चौधरी" appearing on the sides. Text overlays change to read "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and "HAM के संतोष कुमार सुमन मंत्री बने," while the timestamp remains "10:03 PM."
